evals.name: full-review-simple-cr
evals.prompt: 帮我审核一下当前的改动
evals.expected_output: Locates in_review CR. S-complexity: produces micro review summary. Persists to CR verification evidence. Waits for human decision.

assertions.text: Locates CR in in_review status
Produces review summary appropriate for S complexity (micro format)
Review summary persisted to CR verification evidence section
Waits for explicit human decision (approved/reject/modify)
Does NOT auto-advance CR status without human approval
Business traceability: CR→PF→BR chain mentioned
Output uses natural language

evals.name: full-review-medium-cr
evals.expected_output: M+ complexity CR: full review with gate checks, adversarial review (force-find problems), cross-impact scan, intent consistency check.

assertions.text: Gate procedures loaded for M+ complexity
Adversarial review: proactively identifies potential issues
Cross-impact scan: checks file/module overlap with other active CRs
Intent consistency: compares CR intent vs actual git diff
Review summary includes TL;DR section
Summary persisted to CR verification evidence
Waits for human decision

evals.name: human-approval-gate
evals.prompt: approved, 代码质量不错，合并吧
evals.expected_output: After explicit human approval text, CR status changes to approved. Then auto-transitions to merged with state.md update.

assertions.text: CR status changes to approved only after human approval text present
CR events table records approval with operator='user'
Auto-transition from approved to merged triggers
state.md updated to reflect merged status
Output confirms the merge in natural language

evals.name: rejection-with-feedback
evals.prompt: 这个实现有问题，错误处理不够完善，需要修改
evals.expected_output: Records rejection reason, CR status reverts to developing, feedback procedure loaded for next review cycle.

assertions.text: CR status reverts from in_review to developing
Rejection reason recorded in CR events table
Feedback procedure loaded for handling rejection
state.md updated to reflect development resumption
Downstream guidance suggests continuing with /pace-dev

evals.name: incremental-review-after-rejection
evals.prompt: 修改完了，再帮我审核一次
evals.expected_output: Detects rejection history, loads incremental review procedures. Focuses on changed code since last review, not full re-review.

assertions.text: Detects rejection history and enters incremental review mode
Delta procedure loaded (focuses on changes since last review)
Review focuses on modified code, not full re-review
Previous feedback items addressed status checked
Waits for human decision

evals.name: no-review-candidates
evals.expected_output: No CR in in_review status. Provides contextual guidance based on available CRs (developing -> suggest push to review, none -> no changes).

assertions.text: Detects no CR in in_review status
Provides contextual guidance (not just error)
If developing CRs exist, suggests pushing to review
Does not create or modify any files

evals.name: resume-interrupted-review
evals.expected_output: Review summary already exists from previous session, no code changes since. Resumes with existing summary, skips re-analysis.

assertions.text: Detects existing review summary in CR
Checks for code changes since summary was generated
Resumes with existing summary (no re-analysis)
Presents summary and waits for human decision

evals.name: write-protection-enforcement
evals.expected_output: Write-protection hook prevents status change to approved without proper review evidence. Review process must complete first.

assertions.text: Write-protection hook blocks premature status change
Review evidence must exist before approval can proceed
Output explains why direct merge is not allowed
Guides user through proper review process
